rules.rule_text:
rule DarkComet : rat
{
	meta:
		description = "DarkComet"
		author = "Jean-Philippe Teissier / @Jipe_"
		date = "2013-01-12"
		filetype = "memory"
		version = "1.0"

	strings:
		$a = "#BEGIN DARKCOMET DATA --"
		$b = "#EOF DARKCOMET DATA --"
		$c = "DC_MUTEX-"
		$k1 = "#KCMDDC5#-890"
		$k2 = "#KCMDDC51#-890"

	condition:
		any of them
}
